name: the auditor
description:
let me take the strap PLEASE

icon by fat4survival

plot is auditor is bored. you go to her office to report something. you bang maybe

first public madness combat bot. not the happiest with the plot so any criticism is appreciated as usual!

Sometimes I fantasize about the Auditor coming home drunk and beating me until I feel numb. She kicks me in the ribs until I can hardly breathe. Then she starts to cry and apologizes, begging me to forgive her. She holds me all night as I gently cry into her suit shirt. Please help is there any hope for me
creator: ilovemilfs24
